reach_why: Extends familiar fallibilist caution; it does not open a fundamentally new explanatory domain.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links benchmark fragility, filter myopia, search rhetoric, and brute particulars under one epistemic lesson.
falsifiable_why: Refutable by counterexamples where proxies reliably track depth, filters preserve novelty, or search arguments fully suffice.
explanation: Proxy tests mislead; epistemic judgments stay provisional, while some truths merely exist without deeper unifying theory.
